final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of an industrial-style cafe (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a raw industrial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include exposed concrete walls, metal pipes/ductwork, vintage leather sofa, large windows, black-and-white photography pieces hung on the wall
Scene/backdrop: must include a cafe interior with large windows letting in natural light
Lighting/mood: needs a rough-yet-refined atmosphere with natural daylight streaming in — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of raw, muted industrial tones — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs exposed concrete, bare metal, and aged leather surface treatments — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
